title: Transform Any Room with a View
bodyHtml:
AVIR Introduces LiquidView Virtual Windows: Transform Any Room with a View

At AVIR, we understand that not every room is blessed with a scenic view.

Whether you're dealing with a space that looks out onto a blank wall or simply has no windows at all, these limitations can leave even the most beautifully designed rooms feeling incomplete. That’s why we're excited to announce that we now carry LiquidView Virtual Windows – a cutting-edge solution that brings the world's most breathtaking vistas directly into your home or office.

‍

‍

A New Era of Interior Design

LiquidView Virtual Windows are more than just digital displays; they’re a revolution in interior design. By seamlessly integrating stunning 8K video captured by National Geographic-level cinematographers, LiquidView windows provide a dynamic, ever-changing view that adapts to the time of day and location. Whether you want to gaze out at the Eiffel Tower from your downtown apartment or enjoy a serene beach in Hawaii from your landlocked home, LiquidView makes it possible.

But LiquidView is not just about aesthetics. Developed in collaboration with the design powerhouse IDEO, these virtual windows are engineered to enhance wellness and productivity. Research conducted by Stanford University is already exploring how LiquidView’s ability to mimic natural light and outdoor views can reduce stress, lower heart rates, and promote overall mental health.

‍

‍

Features That Go Beyond the Ordinary

LiquidView Virtual Windows offer a range of advanced features that set them apart from anything else on the market:

  • Stunning 8K Views: Each view is meticulously shot over a 24-hour period, ensuring that what you see is not just beautiful, but incredibly lifelike.
  • Unexpected Events: To keep things interesting, LiquidView’s "Unexpected Events" feature introduces random, photo-realistic elements into the view – like a bird flying by or a gentle rain shower – making the experience feel truly immersive.
  • Expanding Library: The view library is continually growing, with new locations being added regularly by LiquidView's dedicated film crews.

‍

‍

‍

Seamless Installation Options

Whether you're looking for a fully integrated solution or something that’s easy to install, LiquidView offers two main configurations to suit your needs:

  1. InWall:
    This option is designed to be recessed into the wall, offering a sleek, integrated look that matches the rest of your space. It requires a minimum wall depth of 6-8 inches and is trim-ready for a custom finish.
  1. OnWall:
    For those who prefer a simpler installation, the OnWall option mounts directly onto your existing wall using a cleat and bracket system. No need for extensive modifications – just a stunning view where there was none before.

‍

‍

‍

Experience the Future of Windows

With LiquidView Virtual Windows, you're not just adding a screen to your wall – you're transforming your space into something extraordinary. Whether it’s enhancing the atmosphere of a windowless room, boosting productivity in an office, or simply bringing a touch of the outdoors into your everyday life, LiquidView offers a solution that’s as innovative as it is beautiful.

‍

Visit AVIR today to explore how LiquidView can redefine the way you experience your space. Starting at $8,999.
